title: Several A-list celebrities reportedly reject invitations to attend Dana White's Trump-linked UFC event
summary_full: Days before UFC Freedom 250 transforms the White House South Lawn into an outdoor fight arena, reports suggest several celebrities invited by Dana White, including Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson, Adam Sandler and Jared Leto, will not attend. The unusual event, tied to America's 250th anniversary celebrations, continues to generate attention for its political associations, unique setting and high-profile guest list.
